name: Girraj Agrawal
professionalSummary: Senior Software Engineer with 12+ years of experience designing and delivering enterprise-grade web applications across customer identity, authentication, profile management, media, telecommunications, and smart-city platforms. Specialized in ReactJS, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, and modern frontend architecture with a strong focus on performance, accessibility, developer experience, and platform scalability. Experienced in leading cross-functional initiatives, mentoring engineers, and delivering secure, customer-facing solutions used by global audiences.
keyAchievements: Led Frontend Architecture Modernization: Spearheaded the transition of legacy enterprise web platforms into highly scalable, modern architectures (React/Next.js), significantly reducing initial load times and boosting overall application performance.

Enforced Technical Governance & Mentorship: * Directed architectural design reviews, established rigorous testing and accessibility guidelines (WCAG compliance), and actively mentored mid-level and senior engineers to elevate engineering excellence.

Optimized State Management & Data Flow: Implemented robust state management standards utilizing tools like Redux Toolkit and managed complex data layers with GraphQL-based integrations and optimized RESTful APIs.

technicalSkills.skills: ReactJS, TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), Next.js, State Management (Redux Toolkit, Zustand), HTML5, CSS3, Angular, React Native, Tailwind CSS, Micro Frontends, Design Systems, SSR, SSG, ISR
Node.js, Express.js, GraphQL, REST APIs, Core Java, Spring Boot (Basics)
Jest, Mocha, Karma, Webpack, Vite, Rollup
AWS, Jenkins, GitLab CI/CD Pipelines, Docker, Logging & Monitoring (Splunk, Datadog, Kibana), PagerDuty Incident Management

WCAG 2.1 Accessibility Compliance, Figma, Storybook, Localization Management (Transifex), Responsive UI Design, Performance Optimization, Code Reviews, Technical Leadership, Mentoring, Cross-functional Collaboration

projects.title: Web Component Development Using Java Technologies
bullets: Engineered backend web components and managed data structures using Core Java, ensuring clean object-oriented design and efficient execution.
Designed and consumed RESTful APIs to facilitate seamless data exchange between Java server modules and client-side applications.
projects.techStack: Core Java, JavaScript, RESTful API, Android and iOS mobile App.

education.school: Uttar Pradesh Technical University, Lucknow, U.P.
